message:
Merge PR #2753: fix: clean stale /tmp/mysql.sock before dolt server start

Remove stale Unix socket file using lsof verification before starting Dolt server,
preventing "file already in use" errors after crashes.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2753
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
